roadmap_items: ROADMAP.md Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer (In Progress) -> define A2UI output contract for agent-produced presentation artifacts, add deterministic schemas, provide CLI rendering fallback for the same structured payloads, and keep the surface client-agnostic
scope_goal: Canonicalize materialized A2UI action order in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py so CLI fallback rendering stays deterministic, and keep the handoff aligned with ROADMAP.md Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer (In Progress) and PRODUCT_VISION.md Capability 5: Agent-to-UI protocol (A2UI).
tasks_completed: Updated the A2UI materialization path in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py to sort filtered actions by canonical JSON before rendering.
Added contract coverage in tests/unit/test_a2ui_contract.py to verify the canonical ordering behavior for materialized action payloads.
Rewrote the lane metadata and packet artifacts to make the roadmap and vision mapping explicit in the required handoff fields.
Kept the lane record scoped to one source file plus matching tests with no routing or provider impact.
